title: EMI Dark Mode
description: I got tired of being flashbanged whenever I needed a recipe
body:
Join the Discord! I post updated on projects there =w=
https://discord.gg/AjC7P8TvgS

Ever play minecraft in the dark and look up a recipe just to be blinded by the unrivaled rage of the sun (light mode)?

No? you play with lights on like a normal person? good for you <3
anyways this pack was quickly thrown together in half an hour so take that as you will

Oh and it has support for:
Smithing Template Viewer for JEI/EMI
